title: durabaculum hornei
intro: Durabaculum hornei, also known as the Horne's climbing fern or the climbing fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lygodiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Durabaculum hornei include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Durabaculum hornei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its rhizomes are also used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
